title: Minimalist Enchantment Glint
description: A much simpler version of the enchantment glint
body:
Are you tired of the obnoxiously bright enchantment glint in vanilla Minecraft? If so, give this a try!

Sometimes I have found the vanilla enchantment glint far too bright and colorful. After a while, the continuous purple waves get repetitive and distracting. With that in mind, I have created this simple texture pack that replaces the default enchantment glint with something far more simple: a single, colorless white gleam instead of the bright purple aura of the vanilla game.

![Diamond armor with default enchantment glint](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TrT0xFb3/images/9d5892d8f390fd64816d2e3136eab7e7422b425e.png)
![Diamond armor with Minimalist Enchantment Glint v2.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TrT0xFb3/images/bb47a2e1a18a643d3828ca00e4fe825bc29996a4.png)

Default enchantment glint (top) and minimalist enchantment glint (bottom). If you can't see the difference (it is very subtle), see video at the bottom of the page.

I forgot to update the .mcmeta files on the later versions, so most versions will say that the pack is outdated, but everything should work just fine.

Video demo of the texture pack in action:
